text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know, when you come up against a<n>big wall, I
think it's perfectly fine to run<n>away at first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's not about getting there the fastest!<n>When
you're on the scenic route, there's<n>no telling what
cool ideas will pop into<n>your head!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So anyway, I've been running away for<n>three days
now, but I still can't think of a<n>way out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, what am I gonna do about<n>tomorrow's
quiz?
